athlete_id.description: Target athlete; defaults to selected athlete in coach mode, or the only athlete otherwise. Format: i12345 or 12345.

item_type.description: Optional upstream custom-item type filter, for example FITNESS_CHART, INPUT_FIELD, ACTIVITY_FIELD, ACTIVITY_STREAM, ACTIVITY_PANEL, ACTIVITY_HISTOGRAM, ACTIVITY_MAP, ACTIVITY_HEATMAP, TRACE_CHART, FITNESS_TABLE, or ZONES.
